metadata.title: Building Interactive Dashboards with Power BI
metadata.description: Designing clear, interactive Power BI dashboards that turn raw numbers into visual stories for non-technical stakeholders.

heading: Building Interactive Dashboards with Power BI
subtitle: Data Visualization
author: Md Shakil Hossen

contents.content: Data is only as valuable as the insights it delivers. At IRD Foundation, I was tasked with making complex datasets accessible to stakeholders who didn't have technical backgrounds. The solution was building interactive Power BI dashboards that turned raw numbers into visual stories.

contents.title: Designing for Clarity
contents.content:
The key principle behind every dashboard I built was clarity. Each visualization had a clear purpose — whether it was tracking website traffic trends, monitoring SEO keyword rankings, or analyzing user behavior patterns.

  • Choose the right chart type for each metric
  • Guide the viewer's eye naturally through layout
  • Keep filters discoverable and intuitive

The interactive dashboards transformed how the team made decisions. Instead of waiting for weekly reports, stakeholders could explore data in real-time, filter by date ranges, and drill down into specific metrics. This improved decision-making speed across all departments.
